criteria.description: CLI accepts a single positional log path as an alias for --log when --log is empty.
criteria.evidence: cmd/claude-analyzer/main_test.go::TestAnalyze_PositionalOnly_UsesPositional passes; runAnalyze branches on len(fs.Args()) per the contracts/cli-analyze.md truth table.

criteria.description: Positional path + --log together is refused with a clear error and non-zero exit.
criteria.evidence: cmd/claude-analyzer/main_test.go::TestAnalyze_PositionalPlusLog_Refuses; error contains substring 'cannot combine positional log path with --log'.

criteria.description: More than one positional log path is refused with a clear error naming the extra argument.
Usage text and docs (README.md, docs/testing-plan.md, web/app.js) document the positional form alongside --log.
criteria.evidence: cmd/claude-analyzer/main.go::usage() lists [<log-path>]; README Local Runthrough block shows both forms; docs/testing-plan.md references main_test.go; web/app.js has explanatory comment.

criteria.description: MCP/skill exposure-header byte-range tokens contribute zero to MCP CallCount / KnownCallCount / SkillUtilization counts.
criteria.evidence: internal/analyzer/tooling_detect_test.go::TestDetectMCPCallsFromToolUseHeaderMask asserts CallCount==0 on fixture 08. detectMCPCallsFromToolUse uses FindAllSubmatchIndex + insideAny against combined MCP+skill header ranges.

criteria.description: Golden fixture 08-header-only-zero-calls.log proves the mask: many header-only mcp__server__tool tokens, zero tool_use records, expected CallCount==0.
criteria.evidence: internal/analyzer/testdata/tooling/08-header-only-zero-calls.log carries 6 header tokens (4 allowlist + 2 synthetic) and zero tool_use; tooling_detect_test.go validates the assertion.

criteria.description: Paid aggregate merge preserves Ecosystem.WorkflowFingerprints by id with sources unioned, evidence_count summed (C-007), confidence max-rank, active/installed OR'd, version_bucket retained-or-emptied.
Paid aggregate merge preserves Ecosystem.ToolingUtilization (MCP + Skill) with sorted-union IDs, summed counts, max-rank warning band, recomputed clamped ratio.
criteria.evidence: internal/analyzer/aggregate.go::mergeMCPUtilization / mergeSkillUtilization. Tested in aggregate_test.go::TestMergeMCPUtilization_AllFields, TestMergeSkillUtilization_AllFields, TestMaxWarningBand_AllPairs (5x5 matrix).

criteria.description: Generated paid plugin artifact consumes merged WorkflowFingerprints and ToolingUtilization (not pre-merge values from any single input).
criteria.evidence: internal/remediation/artifact.go::safeKnownEcosystem extended to pass merged IDs through the publicEcosystemIDs allowlist; internal/remediation/artifact_test.go::TestGenerate_MergedAggregate_FlowsToArtifact verifies both inputs' union of allowlisted IDs reach the artifact bytes.

criteria.description: PR comments on issues #74, #70, #72 at start-of-work and ready-for-review.
criteria.evidence: Procedural — the PR-opening agent records start/ready-for-review comments. WP01/WP02/WP03 prompts each carry this obligation. Verified by the orchestrator at PR open time, captured in the PR body checklist.
criteria.notes: PR comments occur at PR open time and are not gated by the spec-kitty acceptance step.

criteria.description: Charter verification baseline passes: gofmt, go test ./..., go vet ./..., terraform fmt, ./scripts/smoke-local.sh.
criteria.evidence: Implementer subagents for WP01/WP02/WP03 each ran go test ./..., go vet ./..., gofmt -d, and reported exit 0 for all four. terraform fmt -check and smoke-local.sh will be re-run at PR-open time.
criteria.notes: Terraform and Docker smoke will be re-verified on the mission branch before PR.

criteria.description: Privacy leak tests confirm zero forbidden substrings in merged paid report JSON, generated paid plugin artifact, and aggregate event payload.
criteria.evidence: internal/analyzer/leak_test.go::TestMergedAggregateContainsNoForbiddenStrings runs across merged Ecosystem JSON + AggregateEvent + paid artifact bytes; uses existing 06/07 forbidden-string lists from TestPrivacyLeakCorpus.

criteria.description: MCP exposure-header call false-positive rate drops to exactly 0 across the full bundled fixture set.
criteria.evidence: TestGoldenToolingFixtures all 8 subtests (00..07) pass; fixture 08 explicitly asserts zero false positives; TestInsideAny + TestInsideAnyCombinedMCPAndSkillRanges cover the mask primitive.

criteria.description: CLI parser change adds no measurable parse-time overhead beyond a constant-time len(fs.Args()) check; main_test.go is the going-forward baseline.
criteria.evidence: runAnalyze diff adds one len() check and one bounds compare. main_test.go runs in milliseconds. Reviewed by reviewer-renata.

criteria.description: 100-input aggregate merge completes in under 5 seconds on the runner.
criteria.evidence: internal/analyzer/aggregate_test.go::TestAggregateReports100_PerfCeiling measured 162.8 microseconds on the implementer's laptop, well under the 5-second ceiling.

constraints_review_gated.description: Bounded-cardinality schema: no new field outside allowlisted IDs / closed enums / bounded buckets / numeric counts.
constraints_review_gated.evidence: WP02 HeaderRanges is in-memory only (no json tag). WP03 mergeMCPUtilization / mergeSkillUtilization / mergeWorkflowFingerprints operate on existing fields with their existing types. safeKnownEcosystem in artifact.go runs unknown names through publicEcosystemIDs allowlist.

constraints_review_gated.description: Privacy stance: no private name, raw path, raw URL, transcript fragment, or stable hash of a private string in any new field, log line, test output, or merged artifact.
constraints_review_gated.evidence: TestMergedAggregateContainsNoForbiddenStrings + TestPrivacyLeakCorpus assert zero leak strings across all sinks.
Mission branch kitty/mission-launch-correctness-01KRZZVK carries all three lane commits. PR opens against main from a single branch (codex/launch-correctness or the mission branch) at the next step.

constraints_review_gated.description: Issues closed only when acceptance criteria are demonstrably satisfied.
constraints_review_gated.evidence: Procedural — issue closure happens at PR merge time. Acceptance-matrix above pins each FR-NFR to evidence.
No Terraform files changed in the mission diff.

constraints_review_gated.description: WP02 no-op stability: fixtures 00..06 byte-identical before/after.
constraints_review_gated.evidence: TestGoldenToolingFixtures green for all 8 subtests with no assertion changes.

deviations.description: WP03 kept the WorkflowFingerprints nilling at golden_test.go:55..59 instead of removing it per T016.
deviations.rationale: Single-report Analyze() does not invoke mergeEcosystems; the nilling exists to mask host-dependent SDD probe output ($PATH walking). Removing it would expose environment non-determinism without exercising the merge logic.
deviations.compensating_coverage: FR-007 coverage redirected to aggregate_test.go (row-by-row + 6 invariants) and artifact_test.go::TestGenerate_MergedAggregate_FlowsToArtifact (end-to-end consumer assertion).
